transitions.HUB_to_DEPLOYING: Gear packed. Pod hatch sealed. One person capacity, zero personal space.
transitions.DEPLOYING_to_RAIDING: Pod doors hissed open. Zone is hot. Try not to die immediately.
transitions.RAIDING_to_EXTRACTING: Extract beacon deployed. Shuttle ETA about 90 seconds. Please be at the LZ.
transitions.RAIDING_to_DOWNED: Raider is down. Secret Hidden Pocket contents secured.
transitions.EXTRACTING_to_HUB: Successful extraction. Welcome back to Desperanza. Please shower.
transitions.EXTRACTING_to_RAIDING: Shuttle waved off. Extraction unsuccessful. Back into the zone. The water bottles understand.
transitions.EXTRACTING_to_DOWNED: Downed at the LZ. So close. The shuttle pilot filed it under "tragic but funny."
transitions.DOWNED_to_HUB: Respawn in Desperanza. Gear lost. Dignity: pending recovery.
